notes: Planar motion is reconstructed from gravity-aligned IMU acceleration with collision interpolation, acceleration clipping, and zero-velocity resets. | Turning demand is modeled through differential wheel speeds and yaw acceleration, but still depends on assumed track width and yaw inertia. | Battery power uses no-regeneration logic; negative wheel power falls back to auxiliary load only.
